title: Pentagon Announces Assault Plan on Iran Amid Ongoing Blockade

contents:
# Pentagon Announces Assault Plan on Iran Amid Ongoing Blockade

## Overview
The Pentagon announced an assault plan against Iran during a briefing on enforcing the US blockade of Iranian ports.

## Details
US Central Command remains maintaining a strict blockade on all Iranian ports, targeting vessels of any nationality transiting to or from them. On April 20th, US Indopaccom forces interdicted the motor tanker Tiffany carrying sanctioned Iranian oil in support of a Department of Justice request. The conflict escalated after an Iranian-backed suicide bomber attacked the US embassy, killing 63 people including 17 Americans, three Army soldiers, and one Marine. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth faced congressional criticism over the war's launch without approval and its $25 billion cost.

## Location
Washington, United States

## Source Context
Reporting referenced from coverage tracked by the @FoxNews OSINT beat. The cited outlet provides additional context, attribution, and verification of the claims summarized above.

## Tags
US military, Iran blockade, Pentagon briefing, airstrikes plan, Hegseth testimony, Strait of Hormuz, sanctions enforcement
